description: Finding R3-F5: rollback must not blindly overwrite post-migration edits. Before restoring a note's pre-image, rollback verifies the note's CURRENT on-disk bytes still hash to the recorded postImageSha256 (proving no edit landed after migration). Clean.md still matches its postImage → it rolls back byte-exactly. Edited.md was changed after migration (on-disk ≠ postImageSha256) → rollback FAILS CLOSED for that note: it is left untouched, marked conflicted, and the run reports the mismatch for operator review rather than clobbering the newer bytes.
